creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building sysutils/gnome-volume-manager fails using "-O" in CFLAGS.
	"-O2" generates no problem.
	src/manager.c is broken, about "ENABLE_AUTOMOUNT" macro.

Fix: 

I do not know.
	returning to previous way by pointing "--enable-automount" to configure
	can avoid this problem.
	i sent a bug report to bugzilla, but it will be ignored ;-P
How-To-Repeat: 	% cd /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-volume-manager
	% make
	...
	cc  -O -pipe -W -Waggregate-return -Wmissing-prototypes -Wmissing-declarations -Wcast-align -Wbad-function-cast -Wdisabled-optimization -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls  -L/usr/local/lib -o gnome-volume-manager manager.o clipboard.o -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -lgnomeui-2 -lSM -lICE -lbonoboui-2 -lgnomevfs-2 -lgnomecanvas-2 -lgnome-2 -lpopt -lbonobo-2 -lbonobo-activation -lORBit-2 -lart_lgpl_2 -lgconf-2 -lgthread-2.0 -ldbus-glib-1 -lhal -ldbus-1 -lgtk-x11-2.0 -lgdk-x11-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lXext -lXrender -lXinerama -lXi -lXrandr -lXcursor -lXcomposite -lXdamage -lcairo -lpangoft2-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lm -lfreetype -lz -lfontconfig -lX11 -lXfixes -lgobject-2.0 -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -liconv   -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -lnotify -lgtk-x11-2.0 -ldbus-glib-1 -lgdk-x11-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lXext -lXrender -lXinerama -lXi -lXrandr -lXcursor -lXcomposite -lXdamage -lcairo -lpangoft2-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lm -lfreetype -lz -lfontconfi!
 g -lX11 -lXfixes -lgmodule-2.0 -ldbus-1 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -liconv
	manager.o(.text+0x1fe3): In function `import_storage_camera_cb':
	: undefined reference to `gvm_run_filemanager'
	manager.o(.text+0x224f): In function `gvm_device_mounted':
	: undefined reference to `gvm_autorun'
	manager.o(.text+0x2335): In function `gvm_media_changed':
	: undefined reference to `gvm_cdrom_policy'
	gmake[2]: *** [gnome-volume-manager] Error 1
	gmake[2]: directory `/usr/local/work/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-volume-manager/work/gnome-volume-manager-2.22.3/src'
	gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
	gmake[1]: directory `/usr/local/work/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-volume-manager/work/gnome-volume-manager-2.22.3'
	gmake: *** [all] Error 2
	*** Error code 2

	Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-volume-manager.
